Project Case Study

Project: Dining Room Wainscoting in Collegedale TN

Location: Collegedale TN. Service: Wainscoting. Custom wall panel system designed to improve durability and visual structure in a high-traffic dining room.

Project Overview

Custom wall panel system designed to improve durability and visual structure in a high-traffic dining room.

Scope of Work

  • Laser-laid panel spacing and datum lines
  • Installed poplar rails, stiles, and panel backing
  • Caulked, sanded, and primed all transitions
  • Prepared paint-ready finish for homeowner color selection

Materials Used

  • Moisture-resistant MDF panels
  • Poplar rails and stiles
  • Premium primer and enamel
  • Caulked and sanded seams

Before and After

Before, walls showed wear and lacked architectural detail. After, the room gained rhythm, wall protection, and a formal finish.
